project.name: Onboarding Audit - Bug Fixes & Email Standardization

features.name: Standardize Email Templates to Use Database

stories.title: Migrate send-organization-invitation to use DB template
stories.description: Replace hardcoded dark-theme HTML with DB template lookup from encharge_email_templates where template_type='organization_invitation'. Use the pattern from encharge-send-email: fetch template, replace {{variables}}, send via SES.
acceptance: Function fetches template from encharge_email_templates by template_type
Variables (recipient_name, organization_name, inviter_name, action_url) are replaced in template
Falls back to hardcoded HTML if template not found in DB
Email still sends successfully via SES

stories.title: Migrate send-rejoin-invitation to use DB template
stories.description: Replace hardcoded HTML with DB template. Create migration for rejoin_invitation template if not exists. Use encharge-send-email pattern for template fetching.
acceptance: Function fetches template from encharge_email_templates
New rejoin_invitation template exists in DB via migration
Variables replaced correctly
Falls back to hardcoded HTML if template missing

stories.title: Migrate handle-join-request-action rejection to use DB template
stories.description: Replace hardcoded rejection email HTML with DB template lookup for join_request_rejected. The approval path already uses the DB template system correctly.
acceptance: Rejection email fetches join_request_rejected template from DB
Variables (recipient_name, organization_name, rejection_reason) replaced
Falls back to hardcoded HTML if template missing
Approval path unchanged (already correct)

stories.title: Fix InviteSignup profile error handling
stories.description: In InviteSignup.tsx lines 195-219, profile upsert failure only logs a warning but execution continues. If profile creation fails, the subsequent RPC call will fail with FK constraint violation. Should show error toast and stop execution.
acceptance: Profile upsert failure shows error toast to user
Execution stops on profile failure instead of continuing to RPC
Error message is user-friendly

stories.title: Clean up expired invitations before creating new
stories.description: In invitationService.ts, when an existing invitation is expired (line 209), the code falls through to create a new one but leaves the expired record. Delete it first.
acceptance: Expired invitation record is deleted before creating new one
New invitation creates cleanly without orphaned records

stories.title: Expand enrichment polling error messages
stories.description: In onboardingV2Store.ts enrichment polling error handler, add specific detection for credit balance, rate limits, and invalid domain errors with user-friendly messages.
acceptance: Credit/balance errors show billing-related message
Rate limit (429) errors show retry message
All error cases have user-friendly messages
